meaning: n.豪华的旅馆(或餐馆、房屋等)
examples: He lunched with a client at the Ritz.
The Ritz was outlined against the lights up there.
The famous Ritz hotel is up for grabs for $100 million.
She died "peacefully" after suffering a stroke while staying at the Ritz hotel in central London.
There are actually three Yetnikoffs portrayed in the book, which was co-written--quite vividly--with David Ritz .
